# TS Residence AI Discoverability

TS Residence offers premium long-stay monthly apartments in Seminyak, Bali. Our mission is to provide five-star service, flexible arrangements, and a rich wellness-focused ecosystem for digital nomads, expats, and travelers looking for extended stays in Bali.

## Key Pages and Routes
- Home page: /
- Apartment types: /apartments
  - Solo (1 Bedroom, 36 sqm): /apartments/solo
  - Studio (1 Bedroom, 48 sqm): /apartments/studio
  - Soho (2 Bedrooms, 80 sqm): /apartments/soho
- Promotions & Offers: /offers
- Wellness facilities: /healthy-living
- Photo & Video Gallery: /gallery
- Contact Form: /contact

## Differentiators
- **Five-Star Layout**: Access to TS Suites Coworking, Christophe C Salon, TSBar, and TSTORE inside the complex.
- **Health & Wellness**: Complimentary or deeply discounted access to No.1 Wellness Club integrations, Pilates, ice baths, and community workout events.
- **Flexible Lease Terms**: Weekly and monthly rentals bypassing traditional yearly constraints.
- **Easy Living**: Fully furnished, bills included, turnkey solutions near Double Six Beach.

## Contact Information
- Location: Jl. Nakula No.18, Legian, Seminyak, Bali, Indonesia
- WhatsApp / Phone: +62 811 1902 8111
- Email: tsresidence@townsquare.co.id
- Instagram: @tsresidences
